onboarding.slide1_desc: Take a photo and describe the issue to identify potential diseases.
onboarding.slide2_desc: Our AI analyzes and identifies crop diseases in seconds.
onboarding.slide3_desc: Get affordable solutions and prevention tips to protect your harvest.

dashboard.hero_desc: Identify crop diseases early and protect your harvest.
dashboard.early_detection_desc: Regular leaf scanning can prevent up to 80% of crop losses in the early stages of disease.
dashboard.sync_offline: Will sync automatically when back online.

actions.scan_desc: Take a photo of a crop leaf

weather.title: Weather Based Advice
weather.advice: Maize crops are more prone to leaf blight during humid conditions.

scan.title: Scan Leaf
scan.preview_tip: Make sure the leaf is clearly visible and well-lit for the most accurate AI diagnosis.
scan.placeholder: e.g., leaves are turning yellow with brown spots...
scan.char_limit_error: Description must be at least 5 characters
scan.tip_parts: Mention which parts are affected (leaves, stems, fruit)
scan.tip_time: Note when you first noticed the problem
scan.camera_hint: Center the affected leaf within the frame
scan.camera_req_desc: Allow camera access to scan your crop and detect possible diseases.
scan.capture_error: Failed to capture image. Please try again or use the gallery.

result.title: Diagnosis Result
result.empty_desc: We couldn't identify the issue clearly. Please try with a clearer photo or add more symptom description.
result.analysis_error: Failed to analyze. Please try again.
result.generic_error: Something went wrong while analyzing your scan.
result.error_tips:
• Take a clearer photo with good lighting
• Ensure the leaf is in focus
• Include both healthy and affected areas
• Add a description of what you see

analyzing.desc: Our AI is examining your crop leaf

settings.title: Settings
settings.update_msg: You are using the latest version.
settings.error_logout: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
settings.error_signout_all: Failed to sign out of all devices. Please try again.
settings.lang_description: Choose your preferred language for the CropWatch app.

history.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this scan from your history?

auth.sign_in_desc: Sign in to continue monitoring your crops and getting AI diagnoses.
auth.register_desc: Join CropWatch and start protecting your harvest

success.title: Account Created Successfully
success.desc: Your account has been created. You can now sign in to start monitoring your crops and getting AI diagnoses.

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password.
forgot.check_email_desc: We've sent password reset instructions to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and follow the link to reset your password.

language_screen.title: Choose Your Language
language_screen.subtitle: Choose your preferred language
language_screen.pidgin_desc: Wetin you go yarn for farm

permissions.title: Camera Access
permissions.camera_desc: Take photos of your crop leaves

modals.logout_message: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
modals.deactivate_message: This action is permanent and will delete all your data. Are you absolutely sure?
modals.sign_out_all_message: This will log you out of all devices currently using this account.

tips_screen.title: Farming Tips
tips_screen.empty_subtext: Try adjusting your search or filters to find farming advice.

tips.tip1_desc: Too much water can lead to root rot. Water only when the top inch of soil is dry.
tips.tip2_desc: Rotate crops annually to prevent soil depletion and break pest cycles.
tips.tip3_desc: Inspect leaves weekly for early signs of discoloration or pests.
tips.tip4_desc: Plant marigolds near tomatoes to naturally deter nematodes and other pests.
tips.tip5_desc: Apply organic mulch to retain moisture and regulate soil temperature.
tips.tip6_desc: Harvest in the early morning when moisture content is highest for better shelf life.
